title: elaeocarpus roslii subsp. terajanus
intro: Elaeocarpus roslii subsp. terajanus, also known as Terajana Blue Bean, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus roslii subsp. terajanus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
